message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Temperature Sensor A internal sequence

participant "**Internal Sequence**" as IS
participant "getSignal" as GS
participant "AD conversion" as AD
participant "signal processing" as SP

IS -> GS : start
activate IS
activate GS
GS -> AD
activate AD
AD -> SP
activate SP
SP --> AD
deactivate SP
AD --> GS
deactivate AD
GS --> IS : end
deactivate GS
deactivate IS

@enduml
```
